description: Battery technology frontiers - solid-state, lithium alternatives, degradation.

facts.context: Solid-state batteries' main advantage over lithium-ion is:
facts.truth: higher energy density and no flammable liquid electrolyte
distractors: lower manufacturing cost than current lithium-ion batteries
infinite cycle life with zero degradation over time
ability to operate at absolute zero temperature

facts.context: Lithium dendrite formation in batteries causes:
facts.truth: internal short circuits and thermal runaway
distractors: improved battery capacity and energy density
faster charging without any negative effects
longer cycle life through surface area increase

facts.context: Silicon anodes can store 10x more lithium than graphite but fail due to:
distractors: excessive manufacturing costs prohibiting commercialization
chemical incompatibility with all electrolyte formulations
electrical conductivity too high for battery applications

facts.truth: lower energy density for abundant cheap materials
distractors: higher energy density for scarce expensive materials
nothing since sodium is strictly superior to lithium
safety for much higher energy density capability

facts.truth: protects anode but consumes lithium reducing capacity
distractors: has no effect on battery performance whatsoever
increases capacity by storing additional lithium
only forms in solid-state batteries not liquid

facts.context: Fast charging damages batteries primarily by:
facts.truth: lithium plating on anode surface instead of intercalation
distractors: excessive heat generation in the electrolyte only
mechanical stress from rapid ion movement
no damage occurs from fast charging at all

facts.context: Sulfide solid electrolytes offer high conductivity but:
facts.truth: are unstable in air producing toxic H2S gas
distractors: have conductivity too low for practical batteries
are completely stable under all conditions
cost less than liquid electrolytes to produce

facts.context: Lithium-air batteries have highest theoretical energy density but:
facts.truth: suffer from poor reversibility and cycle life
distractors: have already achieved commercial deployment
are limited only by lithium availability
work perfectly with no technical challenges

facts.context: Reducing cobalt in battery cathodes is important because:
facts.truth: cobalt is expensive, scarce, and ethically problematic
distractors: cobalt reduces battery performance significantly
cobalt is abundant but technically unnecessary
regulations prohibit cobalt in all batteries

facts.context: Solid-solid interfaces in batteries are challenging because:
facts.truth: poor contact leads to high resistance and capacity loss
distractors: solid interfaces have lower resistance than liquid
no ion transport occurs across solid interfaces
interfaces improve with cycling automatically

facts.context: Flow batteries are suited for grid storage because:
facts.truth: energy capacity scales independently of power
distractors: they have highest energy density of all batteries
they require no maintenance or electrolyte management
they are cheaper than lithium-ion at all scales

facts.truth: complex chemistry and low economic value of materials
distractors: perfect recycling already achieved at scale
batteries contain no valuable recoverable materials
regulations prevent all battery recycling attempts
